title: filago lutescens subsp. lutescens
intro: Filago lutescens subsp. lutescens, also known as yellow fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, particularly due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, fever, and digestive issues, thanks to its soothing and anti-inflammatory effects. Yellow fleabane can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation, improve sleep, and boost the immune system.
